rationale: Iran deal remains the top story for US residents given potential war/peace implications and oil market effects; all other headlines are background noise.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Conflicting signals on Iran deal signing create continued uncertainty for US residents over potential war risk, oil prices, and Middle East stability.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: US airstrike eliminates TdA gang leader; continuation of established pattern of targeted strikes, minor domestic security signal for US residents.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal AI security policy continues to restrict Anthropic's tools; ongoing background story with limited immediate impact on most US residents' daily lives.
